title: Data Product Entity
description: JSON Schema for Data Product entity in customer workspace (Studio / S3 graph). Flow-graph fields (workflow_id, upstream_entity_id, etc.) describe placement in the workflow canvas. The canonical interoperable catalog and API representation is ODPS v4.1 (Open Data Products Standard): include `odps_document` aligned with https://opendataproducts.org/v4.1/schema/odps.json — see `odps-product.json` and .kiro/specs/odps-data-product-standard in the Loxtep repo.

data_product_id.description: Unique identifier for the data product

organization_id.description: Organization that owns this data product

workflow_id.description: Reference to the workflow that produces this data product

domain_id.description: Optional reference to the domain this data product belongs to

upstream_entity_id.description: Reference to the upstream entity in the flow graph (last transformation, validation, or connection before this data product; source data product in an enrichment flow)

upstream_entity_type.description: Entity type of the upstream entity

user_id.description: User ID of the data product owner

metadata.description: Additional metadata for the data product

created_by.description: User ID who created the data product

updated_by.description: User ID who last updated the data product

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when data product was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when data product was last updated

deleted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when data product was deleted (soft delete)

odps_document.description: Canonical ODPS v4.1 document (`{ product: ... }`). Preferred for platform catalog, governance, and ecosystem interoperability. Validated in the dataproducts API; Loxtep-specific fields under product.custom.loxtep.
